silentHillTownfallStory.title: Silent Hill Townfall Story and Simon Ordell
silentHillTownfallStory.name: Silent Hill Townfall Story and Simon Ordell
silentHillTownfallStory.intro: Silent Hill Townfall follows Simon Ordell as he is drawn back to St. Amelia, where the town, the people he remembers, and the signals on the CRTV begin to align around unfinished business.

beats.title: A Return to Put Things Right
beats.description: Simon is called back to St. Amelia with the sense that something unresolved is waiting for him in the fog.

beats.title: Simon Ordell's Personal Thread
beats.description: Medical details, a worn wristband, and the constant presence of the CRTV frame Simon as someone already tied to the town's damage.

beats.title: Memory, Guilt, and Consequence
beats.description: The story leans into loss, fractured recollection, and the cost of every step deeper into town.

silentHillTownfallLocations.title: Silent Hill Townfall St. Amelia Locations
silentHillTownfallLocations.name: Silent Hill Townfall St. Amelia Locations
silentHillTownfallLocations.intro: St. Amelia is the visual anchor of Silent Hill Townfall, mixing coastal isolation, abandoned civic spaces, and fog-sunk streets that turn navigation into part of the dread.

locations.name: Harbor Approaches
locations.description: Docks, sea walls, and exposed lanes create a bleak introduction to the island town.

locations.name: Town Streets and Housing Blocks
locations.description: Tight alleys, empty homes, and communal buildings make the town feel lived-in even when no one is speaking.

locations.name: Medical and Utility Spaces
locations.description: Clinical interiors and service corridors reinforce Simon's physical condition and the town's failing infrastructure.

locations.name: 1996 Scotland Atmosphere
locations.description: Analog tech, damp weather, and a remote Scottish setting give the game a grounded period identity.

silentHillTownfallCrtv.title: Silent Hill Townfall CRTV Guide
silentHillTownfallCrtv.name: Silent Hill Townfall CRTV Guide
silentHillTownfallCrtv.intro: The CRTV is the signature device of Silent Hill Townfall, acting as a portable screen for signal tuning, environmental reading, and story discovery.

features.title: Signal Tuning
features.description: Adjust the CRTV to lock onto unstable frequencies and reveal where the next clue or threat is building.

features.title: Threat Detection
features.description: Static and signal changes help you sense hostile movement before an encounter fully breaks open.

features.title: Narrative Fragments
features.description: The screen delivers recordings, distortions, and story fragments that make the town's history feel active.

features.title: A New Spin on the Classic Radio
features.description: The CRTV keeps the series tradition of warning systems while giving the feedback a stronger visual role.

silentHillTownfallCombat.title: Silent Hill Townfall Combat and Stealth
silentHillTownfallCombat.name: Silent Hill Townfall Combat and Stealth
silentHillTownfallCombat.intro: Encounters in Silent Hill Townfall are built around pressure, so success comes from choosing when to hide, when to strike, and when to spend resources just to survive the room.

steps.title: Read the Space First
steps.description: Use cover, doorways, and sound cues before committing to any fight in a narrow interior.

steps.title: Use Stealth to Control the Pace
steps.description: Breaking line of sight, moving slowly, and setting up an escape path can keep a bad encounter from becoming a collapse.

steps.title: Commit Hard When You Fight
steps.description: Melee tools and firearms work best when you already know the route out and the target priority.

steps.title: Treat Evasion as a Win Condition
steps.description: Some scenes are about surviving the pursuit and preserving your supplies instead of clearing the area.

silentHillTownfallWalkthrough.title: Silent Hill Townfall Walkthrough and Puzzles
silentHillTownfallWalkthrough.name: Silent Hill Townfall Walkthrough and Puzzles
silentHillTownfallWalkthrough.intro: The homepage walkthrough module focuses on the route logic already visible in official footage so you can organize a cleaner first run once Silent Hill Townfall unlocks.

chapters.name: Arrival and Orientation
chapters.description: Secure the first safe route, learn where the CRTV is most useful, and note every locked path that loops back later.

chapters.name: Town Interior Search
chapters.description: Expect puzzle chains built on collected documents, room sequencing, and tension-heavy revisits through familiar spaces.

chapters.name: Signal Puzzle Workflow
chapters.description: When the CRTV reacts, slow down, test the nearby environment, and verify every visual change before moving on.

chapters.name: Launch-Day Route Planning
chapters.description: Mark dead ends, gather every clue on the first pass, and revisit objective spaces before spending scarce combat resources.

silentHillTownfallEndings.title: Silent Hill Townfall Endings and Choices
silentHillTownfallEndings.name: Silent Hill Townfall Endings and Choices
silentHillTownfallEndings.intro: Silent Hill Townfall points toward multiple endings shaped by how you investigate the town, what clues you prioritize, and how you answer the game's pressure points.

faqs.question: How do Silent Hill Townfall endings differ?
faqs.answer: Silent Hill Townfall endings are built around what Simon learns, which threads you follow through St. Amelia, and the tone of the final decisions you carry into the closing stretch.

faqs.question: Do Silent Hill Townfall choices matter before the final scene?
faqs.answer: Yes. Silent Hill Townfall frames choices through exploration order, clue gathering, and encounter behavior rather than saving every consequence for one last dialogue option.

faqs.question: What should I track to compare Silent Hill Townfall endings?
faqs.answer: Keep notes on which optional spaces you cleared, what CRTV signals you followed, and how you handled major confrontations so repeated runs show what changed.

faqs.question: Can Silent Hill Townfall endings be reviewed without major spoilers?
faqs.answer: Use a spoiler-safe pass first: compare route differences, missed clues, and late-game decision points before reading any full ending breakdown.
